occurrence_sentence: The Programme has also supported Foreword by David van Weel

interaction_phrase: and the AIT Austrian Institute of Technology
occurrence_sentence: Researchers at the Portuguese IT Instituto de Telecomunicações and the AIT Austrian Institute of Technology will work toward this result through the generation and distribution of oblivious keys, allowing for fast and secure multiparty computation.

The event will be hosted in Ifrane, Morocco, and will bring together researchers from 13 NATO allies and partner countries.
source_actor: Mohammed V University in Rabat, Morocco

interaction_phrase: brought together scientists from 12 NATO allies and partner countries
occurrence_sentence: The "Functional Spintronic Nanomaterials for Radiation Detection and Energy Harvesting" Advanced Research Workshop, which was held in May 2023, brought together scientists from 12 NATO allies and partner countries and focused on the scientific foundations of spintronic radar detectors and energy harvesters along with potential applications for armoured vehicle threat detection.

In addition, this workshop was held in conjunction with the celebration for the 125th anniversary of the Igor Sikorsky Kyiv Polytechnic Institute, marking a significant milestone of the oldest and most prestigious Ukrainian institutions and strengthening cooperation with Ukraine on a particularly relevant field of research.

interaction_phrase: Gebze Technical University, Türkiye; National Academy of Sciences of Ukraine

interaction_phrase: Researchers from Gebze Technical University in Türkiye and National Academy of Sciences of Ukraine
occurrence_sentence: Researchers from Gebze Technical University in Türkiye and National Academy of Sciences of Ukraine are investigating the use of ferromagnetic (magnonic) material as an effective medium to transfer quantum information from one quantum system to another.
source_actor: National Academy of Sciences of Ukraine

interaction_phrase: collaboration launched in 2023 by researchers at the University of Texas at Dallas and the Kyiv Academic University
occurrence_sentence: The 'Electrochromic Metal Oxides for Transparent Superconducting Electronics' Multi-Year Project, a collaboration launched in 2023 by researchers at the University of Texas at Dallas and the Kyiv Academic University, aims to pave the way for an entirely new field of transparent electronics: the electronics of transparent superconductors.
